assessments.headline: MOU collapse mechanism confirmed. First US casualties (Jordan). First strike on nuclear infrastructure. Sc4 at 38% (new high).
MOU collapse accelerating. IRGC field compliance zero.
IRGC declares Hormuz closed. Sc4 at 31% (briefing high). Institutional lock-in.
MOU dead. War restarted. Dual chokepoint. Blockade reimposed. Sc4 at 33% (new high).
MOU declared dead. Trump: It is over. US struck 80+ targets. Iran retaliates against 85 US sites.
Sc4 largest single-cycle move. Market mispricing at historic extremes.
MOU implementation stalling. Hormuz transit fragile.
MOU signed. Largest scenario shift in series.
Pre-MOU optimism. Four deal gaps all open.
MOU agreed. Markets trading headline not arithmetic.
Direct kinetic exchange. First US-Iran fire since ceasefire.
